title: CEREBRO v2 - UI Overhaul
description: Complete UI overhaul to match Ashisoft Duplicate File Finder Pro 8.2 with all critical functionality wired.

stories.title: Wire Delete Selected to send2trash
stories.description: Currently deletion uses path.unlink() which permanently deletes files. Must use send2trash to send files to Recycle Bin safely.
acceptanceCriteria: send2trash package added to requirements.txt
main_window.py _on_delete_selected() uses send2trash.send2trash() instead of path.unlink()
Confirmation dialog shows 'Send to Recycle Bin' messaging
Error handling shows which files failed to delete
Deleted files are removed from treeview after successful deletion

stories.title: Build CheckTreeview widget
stories.description: Create ttk.Treeview-based widget with checkbox support for displaying grouped duplicate results. Replaces placeholder in results_panel.py
acceptanceCriteria: cerebro/ui/widgets/check_treeview.py exists with CheckTreeview class
CheckTreeview supports parent/child grouping (group headers + file rows)
Checkboxes toggle on row click
Columns: Checkbox, Name, Size, Modified, Similarity %, Path
Sortable by clicking column headers
Alternating row colors within groups
Group headers show: 'Group N — X files, Y MB reclaimable'
Right-click context menu: Open File, Open Folder, Copy Path, Select Group

stories.title: Rewrite toolbar with Ashisoft-style buttons
stories.description: Current toolbar has single-character icon buttons. Ashisoft has labeled buttons with icons grouped by function.
acceptanceCriteria: Toolbar shows: [📁 Add Folders] [✕ Remove] [▶ Search Now] [⏹ Stop]
Toolbar shows: [📋 Auto Mark ▼] [🗑 Delete] [📦 Move To] [⚙ Settings] [❓ Help]
Buttons grouped with visual separators (|)
'Search Now' button has accent color and text label
'Stop' button hidden until scan starts
'Delete' button has danger color (red)
All buttons have tooltips
Buttons are properly sized with text + icon

stories.title: Wire folder panel → orchestrator → results pipeline
stories.description: Complete data flow from folder selection to scan start to results display.
acceptanceCriteria: Folder panel scan folders passed to orchestrator.configure_scan()
Protected folders passed to orchestrator.configure_scan()
Scan progress updates status bar during scan
On scan complete, results populate CheckTreeview
Empty state shows before scan with 'Add folders and click Search Now'
Scanning state shows progress bar and current file
Results state shows grouped duplicates in treeview

stories.title: Rewrite mode tabs with icons
stories.description: Mode tabs are currently flat segmented button. Need icon + text, compact, left-aligned.
acceptanceCriteria: Mode tabs show: [📄 Files] [🖼 Photos] [🎬 Videos] [🎵 Music] [📁 Empty Folders] [📊 Large Files]
Tabs are compact width (not stretched full width)
Tabs are left-aligned
Active tab has accent bottom border
Clicking tab switches entire content area below
Each tab has its own page layout

stories.title: Move result filter tabs inside results area
stories.description: Filter tabs are currently at top level. Should be inside results panel, visible only after scan.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter tabs show inside results_panel.py, not at main level
Filter tabs are hidden pre-scan, visible post-scan
Filter tabs show counts: [All (347)] [Images (120)] [Videos (45)] [Audio (89)] [Docs (93)]
Filtering works without re-scanning

stories.title: Rewrite left panel as tab-based
stories.description: Left panel currently has three collapsible sections. Should be tab-based with Folders/Protect tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: Left panel has [📁 Folders] [🛡 Protect] tabs
Folders tab shows scan folder list with remove buttons
Folders tab shows scan settings below (Method, Min size, Skip patterns)
Protect tab shows protected folder list
No text truncation or cut-off text

stories.title: Build empty state / getting-started view
stories.description: Pre-scan view should guide users to add folders and start scanning.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty state shows: 'Add folders and click Search Now to find duplicate files'
Empty state has large 'Add Folders' button
Empty state has large 'Search Now' button
Empty state shows numbered instructions

stories.title: Build scanning state with progress
stories.description: During scan, show progress indicator and live file being scanned.
acceptanceCriteria: Scanning state shows progress bar
Scanning state shows 'Scanning: C:\Path\To\file.ext'
Live counters: files scanned, duplicates found so far
Progress bar is animated

stories.title: Rewrite preview panel (collapsed default)
stories.description: Preview panel currently takes 50% of screen and shows when empty. Should be compact and collapsed by default.
acceptanceCriteria: Preview panel hidden by default (collapsed)
Preview panel shows only when file is selected
When visible, takes ~150px height (images) or ~80px (files)
Context-sensitive: image preview for images, metadata for files
Remove 'Keep A' / 'Keep B' buttons
Resizable by dragging divider
